title: get-resume-template MCP Tool Contract
description: Returns the standard markdown resume template specification

tool.name: get-resume-template
tool.description: Returns the standard markdown resume template specification that defines the required structure and syntax for valid resume content.

format.description: Return format for the template (optional, default: markdown)

template.description: The template content in requested format

output.template:
# [Full Name]

**Email**: [email] | **Phone**: [+1234567890] | **Location**: [City, State]
[LinkedIn URL] | [GitHub URL]

## Professional Summary
[2-3 sentence summary of your professional background]

## Work Experience

### [Job Title] at [Company Name]
**[City, State]** | **[MM/YYYY] - [MM/YYYY or Present]**

- [Achievement/responsibility starting with action verb]
- [Achievement with quantifiable result]
- [Key technology or skill demonstrated]

## Education

### [Degree] - [Major] - [Institution]
**[City, State]** | **Graduated: [MM/YYYY]**
GPA: [X.XX] (if 3.5+)

## Skills

**[Category 1]**: [Skill 1], [Skill 2], [Skill 3]
**[Category 2]**: [Skill 1], [Skill 2], [Skill 3]

## Certifications (Optional)

- [Certification Name] - [Issuer] ([MM/YYYY])

## Projects (Optional)

### [Project Name]
[Brief description]
**Technologies**: [Tech stack]
**Link**: [URL]

sections.name: Contact Information
sections.description: Name, email, phone, and optional social links

sections.name: Work Experience
sections.description: Employment history in reverse chronological order

rules: Start with H1 heading for name
Contact info on second line with bold labels
Use H3 for job titles and positions

testScenarios.description: Should return markdown template by default
assertions: output.sections should include Work Experience, Education, Skills as required
output.rules should be an array of strings

testScenarios.description: Should return JSON template when format=json
assertions: output.template should be valid JSON string
parsed template should have name, contact, experience, education, skills properties

testScenarios.description: Should include all required sections in metadata
assertions: output.sections should include section with name='Work Experience' and required=true
output.sections should include section with name='Education' and required=true
output.sections should include section with name='Skills' and required=true
output.sections should include section with name='Certifications' and required=false
output.rules should include 'Start with H1 heading for name'
output.rules should include 'Phone in E.164 format'
